prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 56.4 kg; Height 164.7 cm; BMI 20.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 215mg/dL; 9 months ago 208mg/dL; 6 months ago 172mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 55.9kg; 9 months ago 54.1kg; 6 months ago 55.1kg; 3 months ago 51.2kg; current 56.4kg), Height (12 months ago 164.7cm; 9 months ago 164.7cm; 6 months ago 164.7cm; 3 months ago 164.7cm; current 164.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 10U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 21U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; current 22mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 462mg/g; 9 months ago 450mg/g; 6 months ago 432mg/g; 3 months ago 418mg/g; current 385mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 103mg/dL; 3 months ago 104mg/dL; current 100mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 138mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 133mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.51 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
